name: Democrats.org
subject: Add your name - tell the GOP to back off:
body:
Help us save affordable care. **Add your name if you're still committed to fighting back against the GOP's health care repeal.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170723_dnc_rem&source=em_20170723_dnc_rem")**
[](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20170723_dnc_rem&source=em_20170723_dnc_rem") [](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em_20170723_dnc_rem&source=em_20170723_dnc_rem") [](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=em_20170723_dnc_rem&source=em_20170723_dnc_rem") [](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=em_20170723_dnc_rem&source=em_20170723_dnc_rem")
**[http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+httpmydemocratsorgNoRepeal&utm_campaign=em_20170723_dnc_rem&source=em_20170723_dnc_rem")**

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052317e/4067b0a/3174331e8/7e6d3a6f/1962867849/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170723_dnc_rem&source=em_20170723_dnc_rem"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052317e/4067b0a/3174331e8/7e6d3a6c/1962867849/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170723_dnc_rem&source=em_20170723_dnc_rem"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052317e/4067b0a/3174331e8/7e6d3a6d/1962867849/VEsP/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170723_dnc_rem&source=em_20170723_dnc_rem") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052317e/4067b0a/3174331e8/7e6d3a6a/1962867849/VEsHBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170723_dnc_rem&source=em_20170723_dnc_rem"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|
clean_body: Help us save affordable care. Add your name if you're still committed to fighting back against the GOP's health care repeal. body:

YES or NO \-- Do you think our country is headed in the right direction?

Take a quick poll and tell us now >>>

name: Jeanie Forrester
subject: 🚨 SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT 🚨
body:
Derek,

We need all hands on deck for David Boutin's campaign for State
Senate.

After receiving the Union Leader's endorsement earlier this month
( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=gT2AZ1ZnBy-2FrecDREa9-2BbY1qiyT3HuRDH6pVWPAnYR5m6Dzs1NaYDFZTb0Wxn4THg3mkq9mRYqXuEa2MSRsh1J6FYtvFR-2Fn98YBTRHdL9tY-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MV0hs1SjQ-2B1-2Fm1Y1twoZlQQODSnQxxbofvuSvoRnsR9z4l7xhp18Yxu3fbRM8ew8rkOi9xw5H7-2BTnnnDpMUeRj79PfhAwCRQKEeTYghdPnC8gR1VC-2FMkr6GoSU2ufSMuK6G1K2VJ3DlH8PjdFy6ag-2F7b6wOUJQp-2BpzVib-2Bvk3uN-2BN6IDn3cQ7SjWx6iQUMeIrQpJaLwZ-2FHBp2WpjsCfmVdpvkZgOL0yI-2BDguHHiqPr2M-2Fn2-2BdzQjsJ5azihAgxc4fa0Q7poewE4vmLNd5eWyrzQ-3D-3D ), David Boutin landed another endorsement this past Thursday -
this time from the Concord Monitor. ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=gT2AZ1ZnBy-2FrecDREa9-2BbaIxF3L0PA8q5BHMNPPFA-2Br37YJv4QAgvhiQ7gnqRRhVaYEI5ULbojZxm8L16gr2ryaphrILZVpPSvffD3lcldSbzNVUOk0T5uUh-2FaX2iO6P_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MV0hs1SjQ-2B1-2Fm1Y1twoZlQQODSnQxxbofvuSvoRnsR9z4l7xhp18Yxu3fbRM8ew8rkOi9xw5H7-2BTnnnDpMUeRjxq5is67DjIoG7WK2S7sxlnrsoMAupweWCj0EXXq8Uk-2BvdUz6SFryxUUZsOnRbSRG4I7jO8tHE6O3m2j1RSOngIAlDi9Pn5r5ibyEdc5eOzftiivSBbdRS8PrYxXiGhOWTldImd-2FU67CkkLGTiKoyc7yaiWWYEicuQBQUL3rhaBU-2FgtEXl1bNRGpuUMgYTKdMw-3D-3D )

These two endorsements underline the bipartisan, trusting
approach David Boutin will bring back to Concord after next
week's election.

What are people saying about Boutin's liberal union boss opponent
Kevin Cavanaugh? He's confused, he's pandering, and he lacks
experience. ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=gT2AZ1ZnBy-2FrecDREa9-2BbY1qiyT3HuRDH6pVWPAnYR5FmIQW6PhJ-2FZ4wSdABQwbpPY6Ybfyac3b12qoNY9A8EriahiwesQld-2F9-2BPZ4OwDOhULCur5JoQ9fuxXHNKkuOe_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MV0hs1SjQ-2B1-2Fm1Y1twoZlQQODSnQxxbofvuSvoRnsR9z4l7xhp18Yxu3fbRM8ew8rkOi9xw5H7-2BTnnnDpMUeRj3kHZgPjKhGdwcABIUtp29mIqXRS1K2sFTQSuv2xQCuB5kazT7V2raGy7YsUQUDx8bcJ3W83EmZiWeJjBHiNtpfLfavKOJXSTaM25Dmp6vC0-2B1troZ22ClBYrWuItA9exhuZkeJk9S3B0aXz81FwGmZpOhS5NG7k3cZa9ryxAGibMgFo7Wk-2BZ500z1ZB29M1xg-3D-3D )

Derek, can you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today to
help us secure victory for David Boutin on Tuesday? ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSJlHkk56uzE9VPNypIsXl4-2BevskSfULGYsfTPAyd4Cg1_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MV0hs1SjQ-2B1-2Fm1Y1twoZlQQODSnQxxbofvuSvoRnsR9z4l7xhp18Yxu3fbRM8ew8rkOi9xw5H7-2BTnnnDpMUeRj8XVQYPiYZZwV4HFfx40PXqd7W5hEAPDCXbzysqBj-2BkmsxYzqRSM3SJVpzuDjWoFVi3-2FiRsVL-2BKgDP5WDd2Ez2C-2BKjRB3YXRol3mu0HXf3fexIcDU5q6uY3qekSAUO4hsrpunwSGeplqwAxvZvTMDP4iJkhxBAYdbElO85RlvSA5yzxzb6pdvAl856Ra5uHJww-3D-3D )

A victory in this race is going to be powered by making sure
every Republican in Senate District 16 gets out to vote - when
Republicans vote, Republicans win.

Sign up to volunteer ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=5MdO6cLza2MazVJVOHyurkd4UzRFDwnUSlfHiLVwfpBRRj4XBr8rQS6IbhP1EDK7sBTZzu5rcYeHqhehxlzElg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MV0hs1SjQ-2B1-2Fm1Y1twoZlQQODSnQxxbofvuSvoRnsR9z4l7xhp18Yxu3fbRM8ew8rkOi9xw5H7-2BTnnnDpMUeRj6hjgqkzVGYpMXycc7P-2FFErfPBeloK-2BkqTMMEQz2MMUA15jjVD7UVBgYCyszq5TRE91ekJZ-2Ftta9Odu40gs9KDQFsjBvmKC-2FbVcV1kh5qx9tlmSWSKRNtbIFe1h6oDgkQF-2FpwLi-2BfDYDjGlU4xm-2BknZgz66MjOxaLh-2BSNPrW-2F8HI4axntnM-2BusFTAL27wMY3PQ-3D-3D ) or donate today
and help us secure victory on Tuesday in New Hampshire. ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSJlHkk56uzE9VPNypIsXl4-2BevskSfULGYsfTPAyd4Cg1_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MV0hs1SjQ-2B1-2Fm1Y1twoZlQQODSnQxxbofvuSvoRnsR9z4l7xhp18Yxu3fbRM8ew8rkOi9xw5H7-2BTnnnDpMUeRj4UndaAp70YIt-2FJJPxwJxgmPIdzRoh9-2BHlTQK3Tt9kV6SEi2kQx8mWEw3I5kTFcImB2Uw2JMMIRGATYVLvmy1nkK2198KsOwivRL-2FCXkgcpCQeIptPuyfqNP1MSrcYnC6xgA14XCADpzrN3vpPhTz7U-2FEu74mdYvtSrq2BWVuITLFn7IWKU8rb7YIvSwbbeQdA-3D-3D )

If you live in the towns of Hooksett, Bow, Candia, Dunbarton, or
Wards 1, 2, and 12 of Manchester, vote on Tuesday for Republican
David Boutin.

Sincerely,

Jeanie Forrester
New Hampshire GOP Chair

clean_body: Derek, We need all hands on deck for David Boutin's campaign for State Senate. After receiving the Union Leader's endorsement earlier this month ( ), David Boutin landed another endorsement this past Thursday - this time from the Concord Monitor. ( ) These two endorsements underline the bipartisan, trusting approach David Boutin will bring back to Concord after next week's election. What are people saying about Boutin's liberal union boss opponent Kevin Cavanaugh? He's confused, he's pandering, and he lacks experience. ( ) Derek, can you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today to help us secure victory for David Boutin on Tuesday? ( ) A victory in this race is going to be powered by making sure every Republican in Senate District 16 gets out to vote - when Republicans vote, Republicans win. Sign up to volunteer ( ) or donate today and help us secure victory on Tuesday in New Hampshire. ( ) If you live in the towns of Hooksett, Bow, Candia, Dunbarton, or Wards 1, 2, and 12 of Manchester, vote on Tuesday for Republican David Boutin. Sincerely, Jeanie Forrester New Hampshire GOP Chair VOLUNTEER ( ) CONTRIBUTE ( ) footer image

120 Maryland Ave. NE

and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954dba2/2b07114c/30de9fe2/73116d67/826837906/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954dba2/2b07114c/30de9fe2/73116d66/826837906/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954dba2/2b07114c/30de9fe2/73116d61/826837906/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
